item.title: Where are the 2A "Good Guys"?
item.description: Fp Edit: Hey Imgur, good to see ya. Not feeling great over here. Depression and anxiety are crushing. As the world spirals out of control I am failing to see what anything I worked for us worth. My whole life I was held up to standards that I thought everybody else was. Enjoying the army, became part of the military intelligence Corps. And used to believe that we had standards in this country. When it comes to how our leadership interacts with different parts of our country and/or military. With a bar being so low with people like Marjorie T Green and Bobert in leadership positions, I realize now I have set my personal standards too low and have hampered myself from a composting great things because I thought I would never qualify. Is anybody else having similar feelings? Find me here https://linktr.ee/GridSquares My whole life I've grown up around people who have fetishized firearms and said if there was ever a tyrannical government they would be the first to march. The only ones I see are putting boot polish on their boots so they can kiss them and get stains on their lips. Folks we need to pay attention, the time to play games is over.
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: I stayed up just to bring you Frank
item.description:
This wasn't a planned shot, just a quick click, but man, Frank is a natural.
While waiting for imgur to come back up, Frank fell asleep, then slid off my lap until he was delicately balanced on his nose like a really weird interpretation of Swan Lake
From earlier, his paw...the hint of beans
Here's the full thing. Tiny octopus is no tease.
I love when he falls asleep on my arm. It's like three pounds of pure trust.
Bonus Puddles tax.
Bonus Chessie tax. Good night Imgur. Hope your week was better than the server hamster's was. Remember to go outside and look at the full moon this weekend. It's amazing how beautiful something that we see every day can be if we just pay it a little more attention.
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #162
item.description: The more we push back, the tighter they grip so that everyone sees their authoritarianism. More than a hundred people died in Texas floods and Trump's weather service cuts may be at partly at fault, but they're calling reporters evil for asking questions. ICE raided farmworkers and ordinary locals rushed to help when word spread at internet speed. That freaked them out so much that Tom Homan defiantly said on live TV that they have the right to racially profile. Federal troops are still in Florida and California, prompting a judge to order today that they and police cannot shoot journalists with rubber bullets. These panicked authoritarians are lashing back at anyone who challenges them. Yes, they're more dangerous, but also much more open about it. Keep pushing. Big nationwide protests scheduled for Thursday so figure out now how you can be there. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-kerr-county 2. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-calls-unanswered 3. https://go.govbrief.today/house-review-flood-nws 4. https://go.govbrief.today/weather-staffing-blame 5. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-subpoenas-clinics 6. https://go.govbrief.today/donnelly-promotion-blocked 7. https://go.govbrief.today/one-dead-hundreds-hurt-camarillo 8. https://go.govbrief.today/deputies-prison-refuse-ice 9. https://go.govbrief.today/homan-allows-racial-profiling 10. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-blocks-racial profiling 11. https://go.govbrief.today/union-demands-epa-reinstate-workers 12. https://go.govbrief.today/state-layoffs-1300 13. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-sues-egg-prices 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-superman-poster 15. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-bars-lapd-journalists 16. https://go.govbrief.today/death-threats-cancel-event 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-reporter-evil Yesterday's Top - https://go.govbrief.today/protest-guides-revealed Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/save-our-signs Subscribe (It's Free) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Sooo late today, Imgur, sorry 'bout that. Will be back this evening to hang out and read your comments. Have an amazing Saturday!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Selections from r/ATBGE (Awful Taste But Great Execution)
item.description:
?
Peak Americanism
Note the foot pedals
Their description: Rad opossum dragon champ stamp
Found in a clinic in rural Ukraine
Not sure what the occasion is but congrats I guess
stained glass puking cat
slug nails
business casual pants
the barber who did this is using their talent for evil
The Ratocaster
Keyboard jacket
Butt why
Finally you can be a proud owner of the Chernobyl disaster humidifier
From a state fair baking competition (it did not win)
Handmade watermelon table with duck feet
Permanent gardener statue in front of their house.
Mac 'n cheese handbag

item.title: A Book I Hope to Get My Hands On
item.description: 'In pursuit of counterrevolution and in the name of freedom, U.S. forces or U.S.-supported surrogate forces slaughtered 2,000,000 North Koreans in a three-year war; 3,000,000 Vietnamese; over 500,000 in aerial wars over Laos and Cambodia; over 1,500,000 in Angola; over 1,000,000 in Mozambique; over 500,000 in Afghanistan [as of the book's publication]; 500,000 to 1,000,000 in Indonesia; 200,000 in East Timor; 100,000 in Nicaragua (combining the Somoza and Reagan eras); over 100,000 in Guatemala (plus an additional 40,000 disappeared); over 700,000 in Iraq [again: as of the book's publication. The Iraq War of the 21st century had a death toll of over a million Iraqis.]; over 60,000 in El Salvador; 30,000 in the "dirty war" of Argentina (though the government admits to only 9,000); 35,000 in Taiwan, when Kuomintang military arrived from China; 20,000 in Chile; and many thousands in Haiti, Panama, Grenada, Brazil, South Africa, Western Sahara, Zaire, Turkey, and dozens of other countries, in what ammounts to a free-market world holocaust. Official sources either deny these U.S.-sponsored mass murders or justify them as necessary measures that had to be taken against an implacable communist foe.' - Michael Parenti, Blackshirts & Reds (San Francisco: City Light Books, 1997), p. 25 Thank you to the kind humans who posted links to the PDF version and the copy from City Light Books: PDF file available online: https://welshundergroundnetwork.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/blackshirts-and-reds-by-michael-parenti.pdf Purchase from: https://citylights.com/city-lights-published/blackshirts-reds-rational-fascism/
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Went to see Superman as Supergirl
item.description: The top is an athlete shirt with a custom iron-on sticker, and the bottom is a tennis skirt with hidden 'pockets' inside. The cape is so light that I didn't notice it fell off on my way back home. Luckily, someone on a bike saw it and brought it to me. :)
item.dc:creator: AlexandraValove
